Basic: Okay, okay, we're fine...
S-Sorry! Maybe we could launch a drone in front of their cannons?
I would much rather we avoid taking risks like that...
Dizzy: We could really use one of your shield frones right about now.
We'll be fine! We just need to stall a little longer.
Riggs: It's ok! We'll just dodge the next one.
Listen, they're aim is just really really good right now...
Peri: Just try to stay calm, let me take over the controls.
Isaac: Between the two of us, we'll figure out something.
Need me to take take over? We can swap places.
Drake: Could you stop being such a wuss already Solstice?
HOW AM I SUPPOSED TO BE CALM RIGHT NOW? THEY'RE SHOOTING US.
Max: I mean, we'll probably be fine, right?
Hmm... Gotta agree with you there.
Books: O-Okay, that's wasn't too bad. How's the hull looking?
There there, we'll be fine. Your plant magic can repair that I'm sure.
CAT: Ow... I think the l-last hit rattled me a bit.
We'll just stop by a Pokemon center along the way, calm down.

Basic: Gagnslaus!
Useless!
No structural damage detected?
Oh! Maybe I was worried for nothing?
That's... That's it?
Dizzy: I'm so glad the shields held up...

Basic: Maybe they'll back off now?
The next one's going through your cockpit glass!
I... I was hoping it would do more damage.
Shouldn't take too long, let's keep it up.
I got this one!
Dizzy: Energy can never be destroyed, only transformed.
Let's show them how terrifying Kinetic Energy can be!
Riggs: Wow, you almost didn't sound nervous just now!
Peri: I'm really glad you're here Peri!
Keep harrying them, I'll keep shooting them.
Isaac: Sometimes I forget we even have a cannon.
Wait, you too? Happens to me all the time.
Drake: Of course you did! Now do it again!
If you wanted to give up, now's the time!
AFTER you give us all your stuff, of course.
Books: These crystals of your's are awesome, Books!
CAT: I'm not sure which scandinavian language you even speak, Solstice...

Basic: I hope they're still alive, I intend to do it again...
We're going to take your ship apart. Piece. By. Piece.
You're lucky the void of space is between my coils and your neck for now.
Did we hit their life support systems? Good. Again.
I'm going to break that cockpit like I'm going to break their legs...
Oh am I glad we have these shields...
Oof... I'd much rather we not take shots to begin with, but this works.
No damage? Why do I almost feel disappointed?
O-Oh no...
I... I didn't mean to miss that!
D-Do you think they'll go easy on us if we keep missing?
Calibrating... I hope...
I-I'm going to fight like a cornered animal... Are you two with me?
Moments like these make me feel at peace... And predator-like instincts.
I'll come back next loop make sure they have a slow excrutiating death...
Dizzy: As long as I don't check how many shields we got, it's probably more than zero, right?
Riggs: How can you say that so calmly, are you insane?!
Peri: Their gunshots stopped. You ready to return that pain back to sender?
We'll return it ten times over, Solstice.
Isaac: I CAN'T MAKE DRONES FAST ENOUGH TO BLOCK ALL THESE HITS!
Y-You're making me anxious. I'M GETTING ANXIOUS.
Drake: If this ship is going down, I'm crashing it into their cockpit.
WHOA. Wait, too hardcore, even for me, chill Solstice!
Max: Gonna need to overclock the systems we haven't already.
Siiigh... I'll go turn off the RBG lights.
Books: We'll make them regret not killing us with that attack...
Solsty, you've got a lot of dark magic surrounding you when you're mad...
CAT: Hmngh... That last hit almost felt... Good? Is that normal CAT?
No signs of concussion detected, so... Note to self : Solstice is a masochist.
LarsAether: I swear if you say a bad joke I'm using you as ammo for the last shot we can make.
Hi using you as ammo for the last shot we can make. I'm Lars.
Hi Lars! I'm sure we'll be fineeee

Basic: It doesn't matter where my attacks hit, so long as they hit.
Armour. Let me see if I have any piercing rounds...
I-I think that could have gone w-worse...
W-Wait, how did... OH! Oh,  right!
Ack! What a w-waste of elecricity...
At least the solar panels of the ship can take a load off now?.
W-What do you mean t-there's no more cards?!
I think we got too greedy there...
C-Cmon gang! Reduce, reuse, recycle!
This ship needs more recycling bins...
D-Do we really have to fight them?
Wait, why am I in charge of the cannons again?!
Don't come any clos-They got closer...
I'll start brewing something to melt their hull right away!
Peri: We've got a hostile enemy in the AO!
Isn't an enemy being hostile kind of a given?

Basic: Ooh... I feel a lot better now.
W-Whoa! Did we just completely avoid all their shots?
I'm n-not used to being this mobile, my goodness.
Huh... Dodging all these shots feels almost like cheating.

Riggs: Why aren't you panicking? WE SHOULD BE PANICKING.
Yeah we probably should be, I can't dodge that.
Basic: Why aren't you panicking? WE SHOULD BE PANICKING.
Do you mind orienting the ship 30 degrees to the right? I wanna Photosynthesize.
Huh. Their hull still hasn't fully melted yet?
... I'm glad I brought a game console with me this Loop.
You know, the longer this goes on, the less afraid I feel. Weird.
Wait hold up, what?
Sorry! Sorry, I'm back in the engine bay now.
Are you all okay?! I'm sorry for going missing.
Oh, I think the connection's back!
My comms are back online, I'm gonna make 'em wish it didn't...
Did you know my species is composed mostly of plan-OH THE ENGINE BAY IS ON FIRE.
Try not to freak out, try not to freak out...
My nanobots can't overclock our gear if it's on the verge of MELTING!
I feel... D-Dizzy... Water?
Drake: E-Eunice, I'm already pushing the ship pretty hard...
C'mon, it's just like old times, you'll live Solstice.

Basic: I love sustainable technology~
I... Did I leave the 3D printer turned on?
Alright, recalibrating now using this data.
I'd love to study this thing... I-If it wasn't t-trying to kill us.

Solstice.CrabFacts1_Multi_0: Ooh! Did you also know crabs can regenerate certain body parts?
Solstice.CrabFacts2_Multi_0: Have another factoid, some species of shrimps can fire high-pressure water like a pistol!
Solstice.CrabFactsAreOverNow_Multi_0: Well, I still have a ton more if the rest of you are interested~
